title: pennisetum rigidum
intro: Pennisetum rigidum, also known as Buffel grass, is a perennial grass native to Africa and widely distributed across the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antifungal and antibacterial properties. The leaves and stems of Pennisetum rigidum are used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other health conditions, offering benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or infusion, and its extracts can be found in traditional remedies for treating various ailments.
